tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                   [ch]D[/ch]
    So what you trying to do to me?[/tab]
[tab]                                       [ch]Em[/ch]
It's like we can't stop, we're enemies[/tab]
[tab]                                      [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
But we get along when I'm inside you,   yeah[/tab]
[tab]                                       [ch]D[/ch]
You're like a drug that's killing me[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Em[/ch]
I cut you out entirely[/tab]
[tab]                                      [ch]D[/ch]
But I get so high when I'm inside you[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]                    [ch]C[/ch]
Yeah, you can start over, you can run free[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]
You can find other fish in the sea[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]
You can pretend it's meant to be[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]D[/ch]
But you can't stay away from me[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]
I can still hear you making that sound[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]
Taking me down, rolling on the ground[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]                           [ch]D[/ch]
You can pretend that it was me, but no, oh[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]
Baby, I'm preying on you tonight[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]
Hunt you down, eat you alive[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]
Just like animals, animals[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]D[/ch]
Like animals-mals[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]
Maybe you think that you can hide[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]
I can smell your scent from miles[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]
Just like animals, animals[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]D[/ch]
Like animals-mals[/tab]


[Post-Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
Baby, I'm[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
Baby, I'm[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
Baby, I'm[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
Baby, I'm[/tab]

[Drop]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
Baby, I'm[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
Baby, I'm[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
Baby, I'm[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
Baby, I'm (Oh-oh)[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
Just like animals[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
Just like animals[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
Just like animals[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
Just like animals[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                 [ch]D[/ch]
    So if I run, it's not enough[/tab]
[tab]                                       [ch]Em[/ch]
You're still in my head, forever stuck[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
So you can do what you wanna do,   yeah[/tab]
[tab]                                  [ch]D[/ch]
I love your lies, I'll eat 'em up[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Em[/ch]
But don't deny the animal[/tab]
[tab]                                     [ch]D[/ch]
That comes alive when I'm inside you[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]                    [ch]C[/ch]
Yeah, you can start over, you can run free[/tab]
